events.name: SpX-34 Launch
events.description: SpaceX is targeting Friday, May 15, for Falcon 9’s launch of Dragon’s 34th Commercial Resupply Services (CRS-34) mission for NASA to the International Space Station from Space Launch Complex 40 (SLC-40) at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station in Florida. Liftoff is targeted for 6:05 p.m. ET.

events.name: SpX-34 Dock
events.description: After an approximate 36-hour flight, Dragon will autonomously dock with the orbiting laboratory on Sunday, May 17, at around 7:00 a.m. ET.
